title: chabah #2247
definition:
1) to withdraw, hide, hide oneself
    1a) (Qal) to withdraw
    1b) (Niphal) to hide oneself, remain hidden, withdraw
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to withdraw
    1b) (Niphal) to hide oneself, remain hidden, withdraw

    NASB:  to withdraw, hide
